findings.evidence: `CompatibleMetric.lean:105` defines `SymplecticForm.associatedBilinForm_self_eq_zero`; `AlmostComplex.lean:327` gives `ω.Tames J ↔ (ω.associatedBilinForm J).toQuadraticMap.PosDef`; `Hermitian.lean:175` already uses exactly this combination under `Tames`.
findings.fix: Remove this lemma and replace the uses at lines 135 and 137 with `SymplecticForm.associatedBilinForm_self_eq_zero ((ω.tames_iff_associated_pos J).mp hω)` (or a local `have`).
findings.issue: `associatedBilinForm_self_eq_zero_iff` restates the existing positive-definite diagonal zero criterion under the existing tameness bridge, adding parallel API for the same fact.

summary: The standard-line energy nondegeneracy API is not already present, but the new vector-level diagonal zero helper overlaps existing associated-metric positive-definite API.
